item.title: OpenAI Misses Its Own User and Sales Goals, WSJ Reports
item.author: Bloomberg News (English)
item.description: OpenAI recently failed to meet its own goals for new user acquisition and sales, fueling internal concerns that the company may struggle to support its astronomical spending on AI infrastructure, the Wall Street Journal reported. The company fell short of several monthly sales targets in 2026 after rival Anthropic PBC gained ground in the coding and enterprise markets, WSJ reported Monday, citing unidentified people familiar with the matter.

item.title: BlackRock Says Higher Government Bond Yields Are Here to Stay
item.author: Bloomberg News (English)
item.description: The oil shock from the war will only compound those risks, piling even more pressure on central banks to keep monetary policy tight to rein in prices. That’s bad news for sovereign bonds, given inflation tends to eat away at fixed-income coupons, erode their real returns and dent the securities’ appeal as a hedge against riskier equities.
